author: SantiMod
content:
The Star Atlas DAO was updated with a better and more seamless experience:

 Interface updates
 Bug fixes
 Dark Mode 

You can now set your device to dark mode for the full experience or override it from the interface.

Visit https://govern.staratlas.com/ to see it now!
